mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO statistics_info
statistics_date,
user_id,
date_type,
statistics_count,
#{bean.statisticsDate},
#{bean.userId},
#{bean.dateType},
#{bean.statisticsCount},

INSERT INTO statistics_info
statistics_date,
user_id,
date_type,
statistics_count,
#{bean.statisticsDate},
#{bean.userId},
#{bean.dateType},
#{bean.statisticsCount},
on DUPLICATE key update
statistics_date = VALUES(statistics_date),
user_id = VALUES(user_id),
date_type = VALUES(date_type),
statistics_count = VALUES(statistics_count),

INSERT INTO statistics_info( statistics_date, user_id, date_type, statistics_count )values
( #{item.statisticsDate}, #{item.userId}, #{item.dateType}, #{item.statisticsCount} )

INSERT INTO statistics_info( statistics_date, user_id, date_type, statistics_count )values
( #{item.statisticsDate}, #{item.userId}, #{item.dateType}, #{item.statisticsCount} )
on DUPLICATE key update statistics_date = VALUES(statistics_date), user_id = VALUES(user_id), date_type = VALUES(date_type), statistics_count = VALUES(statistics_count)
mapper.update:
UPDATE statistics_info s
statistics_date = #{bean.statisticsDate},
user_id = #{bean.userId},
date_type = #{bean.dateType},
statistics_count = #{bean.statisticsCount},
mapper.delete: delete from statistics_info where statistics_date=#{statisticsDate} and user_id=#{userId} and date_type=#{dateType}
mapper.select: select from statistics_info s where statistics_date=#{statisticsDate} and user_id=#{userId} and date_type=#{dateType}
select focus_user_id userId ,count(1) statisticsCount from user_focus where DATE_FORMAT(focus_time,'%Y-%m-%d')=#{statisticsData} group by focus_user_id
select video_user_id userId ,count(1) statisticsCount from video_comment where DATE_FORMAT(comment_time,'%Y-%m-%d')=#{statisticsData} group by video_id

select video_user_id userId ,action_type data_type ,sum(action_count) ,count(1) statisticsCount statisticsCount from user_action where DATE_FORMAT(action_time,'%Y-%m-%d')=#{statisticsData} and action_type in ( #{item} ) group by video_user_id,action_type

select ifnull(sum(play_count),0) playCount, ifnull(sum(like_count),0) likeCount, ifnull(sum(coin_count),0) coinCount, ifnull(sum(danmu_count),0) danmuCount, ifnull(sum(comment_count),0) commentCount, ifnull(sum(collect_count),0) collectCount from video_info
and user_id=#{userId}

select ifnull(sum(statistics_count),0) statistics_count,statistics_date,date_type from statistics_info s
group by date_type,statistics_date
select count(1) statistics_count, DATE_FORMAT(join_time,"%Y-%m-%d") statistics_date from user_info group by statistics_date order by statistics_date asc
